tvShow.name: The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, REALLY Love You
tvShow.originalName: 君のことが大大大大大好きな100人の彼女
tvShow.overview: Rentaro Aijo was rejected 100 times in middle school. He visits a shrine and prays for better luck in high school. The God of Love appears and promises that he'll soon meet 100 people he's destined to date. But there's a catch—once destiny introduces someone to him, the two must happily love each other. If they don't, they'll die. What will befall Rentaro and his 100 girlfriends in high school?

episodes.name: The 2 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really Love You (98 To Go)
episodes.overview: Aijo Rentaro has faced 100 rejections in life, and when he goes to a matchmaking shrine to pray for love, he finds that he will get more than he ever bargained for in high school.

episodes.name: First Kiss
episodes.overview: Hakari and Karane learn that Rentaro hasn't had his first kiss yet. They may both be his girlfriends, but they still want his first kiss for themselves!

episodes.name: The Quiet Princess, the Knight, and the Samurai
episodes.overview: Rentaro has encountered his third soulmate: the shy and smol Yoshimoto Shizuka. How will he get her to open up to him and, more importantly, how will he choose to deal with her?

episodes.name: Just When You Think It's a Hanky-Panky Episode
episodes.overview: Rentaro has a plan to break the ice between Hakari, Karane, and Shizuka, and it involves laughter and Old Maid. But things take a turn for the unexpected.

episodes.name: The Hyper-Efficient Girl
episodes.overview: Rentaro encounters the smartest student in school, Eiai Nano, and it turns out she's a soulmate, too! However, her extreme rationality leads him to question whether they really are meant for each other.

episodes.name: Everyone's Favorite: The Swimsuit Episode
episodes.overview: Rentaro and the girls hit the newly opened water park at Hakari's suggestion, but Karane appears to have come down with a mysterious chill. Will the gang really get to enjoy their day out at the pool?

episodes.name: Saying Hello to the Chemistry Girl
episodes.overview: Rentaro locks eyes with another soulmate: a beautiful girl in the Chemistry Lab. But when he visits the lab the next day, he instead finds a pint-sized bundle of energy who is... obsessed with drugs?

episodes.name: Kiss Zombie Panic
episodes.overview: Under attack from the kiss zombies, can Rentaro and Kusuri figure out a way to turn them back to normal? Or are they doomed to smooch forever?

episodes.name: The Holy War of Love and Soul
episodes.overview: The gang has a day out at a flower park on Hakari's suggestion. Little did they know that she did it for a reason.

episodes.name: Love Mission: Impossible
episodes.overview: The Rentaro Family gears up to raid the Hanazono mansion to get Hakari out.

episodes.name: Even If It Kills Me
episodes.overview: Hahari may have been blinded by love, but Hakari's happiness remains her number one priority. How can Rentaro convince her that his love is real?

episodes.name: The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, REALLY Love You (94 to Go)
episodes.overview: How will the gang adjust to the newest girlfriend, and what shenanigans will she bring into play during this sleepover?

episodes.name: Her Name.
episodes.overview: Season 2 begins, and the gap between the seasons means the girlfriends are immediately faced with a crisis. Rentaro, meanwhile, happens to run into a very hungry girl...

episodes.name: The Beginning and the End! Food Fight Festival!
episodes.overview: The food fight festival is here, and the Rentaro Family moves out in order to win the special gelato for themselves. Will they be successful?

episodes.name: What Does the Maid See?
episodes.overview: Hakari laments the change in her once dignified mother. Meanwhile, Hahari's maid piques the gang's curiosity.

episodes.name: Super Soaked Maid Party
episodes.overview: Only one way to welcome a maid into the crew: everyone changes into maid outfits and has a shootout!

episodes.name: Most Athletes Are Masochists
episodes.overview: While the girlfriends are forced to work out, Rentaro runs into a girl who punishes herself for other reasons.

episodes.name: A Homerun Promise
episodes.overview: It's time for the big game. Will the Rentaro Family win and ensure the baseball team's survival?

episodes.name: Karaoke Crisis
episodes.overview: The gang goes to karaoke! But how will Shizuka manage?

episodes.name: The Beautiful and the Bold
episodes.overview: Mimimi and Nano face off in a Beauty Search contest to determine who'll be exiled from the Rentaro Family.

episodes.name: The World Hair Only Grows
episodes.overview: With Rentaro still shaved from the beauty search, the gang decide to show solidarity...to disastrous results.

episodes.name: Peekaboy-Meets-Girl
episodes.overview: Kakure Meme is an extremely shy girl who wishes to live life as a no-name background character. Will she succeed?

episodes.name: Tsundere Lost
episodes.overview: Karane becomes increasingly worried at her inability to be sincere and express her feelings. What will she do?

episodes.name: The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, REALLY Love You (89 to Go)
episodes.overview: Rentaro has come up with a convoluted plan to get Karane's tsundere back. Will it work out?

episodes.name: Cousin and Girlfriend
episodes.overview: A reporter asks about love at the shopping mall where Rentaro and some of the girls are.

episodes.name: Chiyo's Family Coaching
episodes.overview: Rentaro introduces his new girlfriend to the family as always, but she's shocked by the state of affairs.
